leaves.title: Inventory raw-ingress requirements against the checked-in runtime path
leaves.objective: Map the exact raw bundle surfaces required by RealDataBundle, real_data_loader, and downstream cognition ingress before admitting any canonical raw artefact.
ordered_actions: Inventory the required raw surfaces and mark which are already present versus absent.
Name the exact canonical artefact path expected for the admitted bundle.
Record a stop condition if any required raw surface is still absent.
forbidden_actions: Do not broaden workbook doctrine into runtime truth.
Do not start Gate 102 from prepared data while claiming Gate 101 passed.
expected_evidence: explicit raw-ingress inventory and stop condition
definition_of_done: required raw surfaces are frozen explicitly before any canonical bundle admission is attempted

leaves.title: Admit one canonical raw bundle or freeze a blocker honestly
leaves.objective: Check in or otherwise admit one lawful raw bundle, or stop the pack with an explicit blocker if the raw truth does not exist.
ordered_actions: Admit one canonical raw bundle only if all required raw surfaces exist.
Generate only mechanically derivable downstream surfaces.
If the bundle cannot be admitted, freeze the blocker and stop the successor pack.
forbidden_actions: Do not fabricate missing option-chain rows or event rows.
Do not mark Gate 101 complete while any required raw surface is absent.
expected_evidence: canonical raw bundle admitted or explicit blocker frozen
definition_of_done: Gate 101 truth is explicit enough that Gate 102 either can begin lawfully or is clearly blocked

leaves.title: Build the canonical raw-path harness
leaves.objective: Create one deterministic test harness that starts at the admitted raw bundle and reaches review outputs through the checked-in runtime path.
ordered_actions: Build the raw-path harness helper.
Exercise real_data_loader, chain_to_cognition, and DeskCognitionRuntime.run(...) in one test path.
forbidden_actions: Do not bypass the raw loader while claiming raw-path coverage.
definition_of_done: one canonical raw-path run is executable

leaves.title: Freeze deterministic outputs and lineage for the canonical raw path
leaves.objective: Assert stable runtime outputs, packet lineage, and review surfaces for the admitted raw-path harness.
ordered_actions: Freeze deterministic expectations for the canonical raw-path run.
Record any admissible differences explicitly.
forbidden_actions: Do not rely on prose only.
expected_evidence: raw-path outputs and lineage frozen by tests
definition_of_done: Gate 102 proves a deterministic raw-path run

leaves.title: Freeze bounded parity between the raw and prepared canonical paths
leaves.objective: Assert parity on the lawful surfaces that should agree between the canonical raw-path harness and the canonical prepared-runtime harness.
ordered_actions: Define the comparable parity surface.
Assert agreement or document admissible divergence.
forbidden_actions: Do not demand bit-for-bit equality where the two paths are not semantically identical.
definition_of_done: comparable lawful surfaces are no longer hand-waved

leaves.title: Extend lawful-output invariants to the canonical raw path
leaves.objective: Run the invariant regime against the raw path as well as the prepared path.
ordered_actions: Expand the invariant suite to cover the raw path.
Keep blocked, derisked, and permissive laws explicit.
forbidden_actions: Do not weaken the prepared-path invariant suite to make parity easier.
expected_evidence: lawful-output invariants cover the raw path
definition_of_done: Gate 103 closes the gap between raw-path harnessing and runtime-law testing

leaves.title: Add targeted property tests for the bounded high-risk services
leaves.objective: Use Hypothesis/property testing only on the selected services where bounded edge exploration has the highest payoff.
ordered_actions: Add bounded property tests for threshold and monotonicity law.
Keep the strategy set narrow and deterministic enough for CI.
forbidden_actions: Do not spray property tests repo-wide.
expected_evidence: property tests close bounded state-space gaps
definition_of_done: selected services gain bounded edge exploration without sprawl

leaves.title: Add targeted stateful sequence tests
leaves.objective: Use stateful testing where ordered transitions matter more than isolated values.
ordered_actions: Add stateful tests for selected event-window or store transitions.
Assert sequence law rather than static examples only.
forbidden_actions: Do not duplicate Gate 99 snapshot-transition tests; this gate is for generated state sequences.
definition_of_done: Gate 104 adds the generated sequence layer that the first pack intentionally skipped

leaves.title: Add typed ingress coercion-versus-strictness tests
leaves.objective: Freeze which coercions are allowed and which are prohibited on the selected typed ingress surfaces.
ordered_actions: Select the ingress models that matter most.
Add explicit acceptance and rejection cases.
forbidden_actions: Do not blanket-enable strict mode repo-wide without doctrine change.
definition_of_done: coercion drift stops being an implied behaviour

leaves.title: Add repo-native DB/API seam validation
leaves.objective: Exercise transaction-boundary and HTTP dependency seams using the repo venv and official test patterns.
ordered_actions: Add SQLAlchemy transaction/session tests for selected service seams.
Add bounded FastAPI TestClient dependency-override tests for selected endpoints.
forbidden_actions: Do not claim repo-native DB/API coverage from a dependency-missing shell outside the repo venv.
expected_evidence: DB/API seam correctness proven in the intended repo environment
definition_of_done: boundary tests cover persistence and HTTP seams explicitly

leaves.title: Close the successor pack honestly across the planning quartet
leaves.objective: Update the planning quartet only after Gates 101–105 are truly complete.
ordered_actions: Update the planning quartet together.
Do not leave the next active gate ambiguous.
forbidden_actions: Do not call the successor pack closed while Gate 101 is still blocked or open.
definition_of_done: no ambiguity remains about successor-pack status

leaves.title: Package the repo from the exact green state
leaves.objective: Cut the full-history zip from the exact green successor-pack closeout state.
ordered_actions: Run the targeted proof matrix for Gates 101–105.
Create the zip from that exact state.
forbidden_actions: Do not package from a dirty tree.
expected_evidence: zip created from exact green state
